message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker — close 5bqje, register 3 new pins

In-place JSONL row replacement + 3 new rows:

  - 5bqje  Pin fcp-core RegistryToken Display — closed (shipped at
           568cbcb9f as SecretAccessToken pin; the bead's named type does
           not exist in fcp-core, SecretAccessToken is the registry-style
           secret holder analogue).

  New (open):
  - 3pz0m  Pin fcp-core PolicyDecisionLog serde JSON+CBOR
  - gmw4e  Pin fcp-core ConnectorReadiness Display + serde
  - jcxq8  Pin fcp-core ZoneJoinError variant Display + serde tag
